'''thapupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wafflehouse|wafflehouse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wafflehouse|wafflehouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thapupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæpipith|thæpipith]] || [[word:thæpipij|thæpipij]] || [[word:thæpipish|thæpipish]] || [[word:thæpipi|thæpipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thapupuputh|thapupuputh]] || [[word:thapupupuj|thapupupuj]] || [[word:thapupupush|thapupupush]] || [[word:thapupupu|thapupupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapuputh|thapuputh]] || [[word:thapupuj|thapupuj]] || [[word:thapupush|thapupush]] || [[word:thapupu|thapupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapufputh|thapufputh]] || [[word:thapufpuj|thapufpuj]] || [[word:thapufpush|thapufpush]] || [[word:thapufpuf|thapufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thapuputhu|thapuputhu]] || [[word:thapupuju|thapupuju]] || [[word:thapupushu|thapupushu]] || [[word:thapupuku|thapupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thapuputh|thapuputh]] || [[word:thapupuj|thapupuj]] || [[word:thapupush|thapupush]] || [[word:thapupu|thapupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thapuputhul|thapuputhul]] || [[word:thapupujul|thapupujul]] || [[word:thapupushul|thapupushul]] || [[word:thapupukul|thapupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thapuputhuthu|thapuputhuthu]] || [[word:thapupujuju|thapupujuju]] || [[word:thapupushushu|thapupushushu]] || [[word:thapupuku|thapupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thapuputhun|thapuputhun]] || [[word:thapupujun|thapupujun]] || [[word:thapupushun|thapupushun]] || [[word:thapupukun|thapupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thapuputhuoro|thapuputhuoro]] || [[word:thapupujuoro|thapupujuoro]] || [[word:thapupushuoro|thapupushuoro]] || [[word:thapupukuoro|thapupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
